required_edits: Set atropos/memory/CONTRACTS/supersession.json status/normativity to RATIFICATION-PENDING (not NORMATIVE-CURRENT/NORMATIVE) until this council authorizes and the authority triple attaches — the live contract must not pre-claim normativity the plan §6 explicitly defers.

Rewrite becomes_normative_when to match plan §6 exactly: tests pass AND TELOS authorization/authority triple AND enrollment integration with docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (atropos manifest entry + future-atropos-unimplemented→implemented flip); tests-only is insufficient.

Reconcile #superseded entry shape for note: plan §3 requires EXACTLY the closed key set including note:string; contract currently marks note optional — make contract and verifier pin the same closed shape (required string note, or amend the plan if optional is intended).
rationale: Cycle-1 scope, registered meaning (verification half of retires only), read-only/zero-dep/fail-closed trust posture, plan-version normative checks, node-backed UNREPRESENTABLE deferral, clotho non-import, and disk-resolved terminal active_plan.sha256 are coherent with the pre-review and stated NON-CLAIMS. Implementation-before-council is an Eye build-mode exception the plan records honestly and does not by itself block ratification. Remaining contradictions are between the matured plan and the contract artifact under authorization (premature NORMATIVE-CURRENT, incomplete becomes_normative_when, note required-vs-optional). Those are fixable metadata/shape alignments; once edited, the plan is approvable AS-IS without expanding scope or reopening deferred node-backed work.
